title: The Adventures of Buratino
director: Dmitriy Babichenko, Ivan Ivanov-Vano, Mikhail Botov
writer: Aleksei Tolstoy, Nikolay Erdman, Lyudmila Tolstaya
actors: Nina Gulyaeva, Evgeniy Vesnik, Georgiy Vitsin
plot: A colorful fairy tale about a little wooden boy Buratino and his quest for the Golden Key that opens a secret door.
